hero.label: SH Web Developer
hero.title: I build modern websites for businesses
hero.subtitle: Landing Pages • Business Websites • Corporate Websites

about.label: About me
about.title: I build websites with a focus on design, speed and usability
about.paragraph1: My name is Oleksandra, and I am a Front-End Web Developer. I create modern landing pages and portfolio-style websites for experts, small businesses and personal brands.
about.paragraph2: I work with React, Next.js, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS. For me, a website should not only look beautiful, but also be clear, fast, responsive and help clients make decisions.

services.subtitle: Services
services.title: What I Can Do for You

landing.title: Landing Page
landing.description: A modern one-page website to showcase your service, product or personal brand.

businessCard.title: Business Website
businessCard.description: A clean website presenting you, your services, key benefits and contact information.

redesign.title: Website Redesign
redesign.description: Refreshing your existing website with a modern design, improved structure and better user experience.

integrations.title: Forms & Integrations
integrations.description: Integration of contact forms, Telegram, WhatsApp, payment systems and other simple services.

projects.subtitle: Portfolio
projects.title: My Latest Projects
projects.webstudio: A responsive multi-page website for a web studio with a mobile menu and modern layout.
projects.leleka: A team project for a corporate website. I worked on SEO metadata and the contact form.
projects.portfolio: A team portfolio project where I served as Team Lead and contributed to the user interface.
projects.greenHarvest: A team landing page project for an organic vegetables service with a responsive design.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: Request a Callback
contact.description: Message me on Telegram, WhatsApp, Viber or send a request through the form.
contact.cardText: Tell me what kind of website you need: a landing page, business website, redesign or request form. I reply in writing through the messenger that is most convenient for you.

contactForm.serviceLabel: What kind of website do you need?
contactForm.success: Thank you! Your request has been received. I will contact you soon.

footer.description: Modern landing pages and business websites for experts, freelancers and small businesses.
